summary: MetafieldDefinitionCreate PRODUCT ownerType resource limit capture. The script records the preflight catalog, creates disposable PRODUCT definitions until Shopify returns RESOURCE_TYPE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED, probes a second namespace after the limit, then deletes every created definition.
